narrative:
Upper Twp. township has 9,266 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.6 percentage points.
